steps.title: Set up the perimeter equation
steps.content: Let the unknown third side be $x$. The perimeter is the sum of all three sides: $$24 + 24 + x = 83$$.

steps.title: Backsolving — testing choice B (35)
steps.content:
Substitute $x = 35$ into the perimeter equation: $$24 + 24 + 35 = 83$$.
Since the left‑hand side equals the given perimeter, choice B satisfies the condition.
The answer is 35.
